summary: Comprehensive testing of Connection Wizard, Multi-Platform Sync, and Dynamic SSR features. All 11 backend tests pass. All frontend tests pass. Connection Wizard opens correctly with 4-step progress bar, platform groups (E-Commerce/Advertising/Marketplaces), and proper OAuth/non-OAuth flows. Synced Products page loads with empty state. SSR serves live product data to crawlers.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Connection Wizard and Multi-Platform Sync features are fully functional. Wizard has 4-step progress bar (Choose Platform, Setup Guide, Enter Credentials, Connect). Platforms grouped by E-Commerce/Advertising/Marketplaces. Shopify shows credentials step with shop domain field. Non-OAuth platforms (WooCommerce) show setup guide then credentials. Synced Products page at /synced-products shows empty state with 'Connect a Store' button. SSR for /trending-products works - Googlebot gets ssr-content div with 20 article tags, regular browsers get SPA.

backend_api_tests.POST /api/sync/etsy/products: PASS - Returns 404 'No active etsy connection found'
backend_api_tests.POST /api/sync/woocommerce/products: PASS - Returns 404 'No active woocommerce connection found'
backend_api_tests.POST /api/sync/amazon/products: PASS - Returns 404 (no connection) or beta message

frontend_ui_tests.4-step progress bar labels: PASS - Choose Platform, Setup Guide, Enter Credentials, Connect
frontend_ui_tests.E-Commerce group visible: PASS - Shows Shopify, WooCommerce, Etsy, etc.
frontend_ui_tests.Advertising group visible: PASS - Shows Meta, TikTok Ads, Google Ads
frontend_ui_tests.Shopify credentials step: PASS - Shows shop domain input field
frontend_ui_tests.WooCommerce setup guide step: PASS - Shows setup instructions for non-OAuth
frontend_ui_tests.WooCommerce credentials step: PASS - Shows Store URL, API Key, API Secret fields
frontend_ui_tests.Admin OAuth section (demo): PASS - NOT visible for demo user
frontend_ui_tests.Synced Products empty state: PASS - Shows 'No Synced Products' with 'Connect a Store' button

ssr_tests.Googlebot /trending-products: PASS - Has ssr-content div with product data

features_verified: Connection Wizard opens when clicking 'Connect Platform' button on /settings/connections
Connection Wizard shows all platforms grouped by E-Commerce/Advertising/Marketplaces
Clicking Shopify in wizard shows credential step with shop domain field
Clicking a non-OAuth platform (WooCommerce) shows setup guide step
Wizard has 4-step progress bar (Choose Platform, Setup Guide, Enter Credentials, Connect)
Synced Products page at /synced-products loads and shows empty state
Synced Products page has 'Connect a Store' button linking to connections
GET /api/sync/products returns unified synced products (requires auth)
POST /api/sync/etsy/products returns error without active etsy connection
POST /api/sync/woocommerce/products returns error without active woocommerce connection
Login works for admin and demo users
SSR: Crawler request to /trending-products with Googlebot UA returns product data in HTML
SSR: Regular browser request to /trending-products does NOT contain ssr-content div
Admin OAuth panel still works (regression check)
